rights_scope: Research and test evidence only; no formal game release is authorized by this record.
limitations: The source defines five independent menu-selected victories and no aggregate campaign ending; the standard ending milestone names the fifth required victory, while game-complete names the verified final return to the live menu.
The strict Replay v1 trace serializes the ordinary six-button masks; the six real source-authored pause-menu invocations remain bound by the extended replay, runner revision, and checkpoint hashes.
This is private research evidence, not official-runtime compatibility, HD review, human acceptance, or publication authorization.
